_comment: Single config for auto mode. One entry per forge phase. Chain order (spec -> plan -> impl -> review) is fixed in code; this file only tunes the knobs. Read at runtime from the mounted repo, so edits take effect on the next `lanes` run — no image rebuild. model: opus|sonnet|haiku. skill/skills: the superpowers skill(s) the phase uses (null/absent = built-in self-review for review). maxTurns/maxThinkingTokens: null = no limit; set a positive integer to cap (runaway/cost guard).
